statement: In every magma, Equation 409 (`x * y = (z * w) * w`) implies Equation 4659 (`(x * y) * y = (y * x) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0362
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z w) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op (op x y) y) = (op (op y x) z)
